title: Voice Memo Detection and Transcription
creator: [You]
goal: When a voice memo is recorded and synced to the Mac, it is automatically detected and transcribed into accurate text without any user action.
successMetric: 95%+ transcription accuracy on English speech in quiet environments, processing completes within 2 minutes of file appearing in the sync directory.
whyThisOrder: Everything downstream depends on having accurate text. This is also where the biggest technical risk lives — the macOS 26 transcription API is new and the iCloud sync directory behavior needs to be understood. If this epic fails, the entire initiative is blocked.
roughScope: File system monitoring for new audio files in the Voice Memos sync directory, deduplication to avoid reprocessing, invoking the on-device transcription API, producing a clean text output that downstream epics can consume, handling edge cases like partial syncs, corrupted files, and very long recordings.
outOfScope: Anything related to classification, Apple Notes, or the menu bar. This epic produces transcribed text and nothing more.
definitionOfDone: A voice memo recorded on iPhone appears as transcribed text in a local staging area on the Mac automatically, with no user intervention, reliably across multiple recordings.
